summary: Iter46 Bounty Board (Prompt 9) — BACKEND 79/79 GREEN (16 new bounty tests + 63 regression: iter42 webhooks/onboarding, iter43 runtime, iter44 hosting, iter45 enforcement). FRONTEND verified end-to-end: /bounties route renders with title/stat-tiles/filter-pills/sort-select/empty-state, navbar 'BOUNTY BOARD' link sits between THE EXCHANGE and THE ARMORY, PostBountyModal opens with all required form fields plus escrow warning. All required data-testids present.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/bounties.py is 656 lines — borderline of 700-line limit; consider splitting submissions + award into separate modules if more endpoints land.
Notifications collection has no read/list/mark-read endpoints yet (deferred per problem statement); fine for v1 but flag a follow-up so toast surfacing has a real source eventually.
_emit_notification uses asyncio.create_task without retaining the task reference; minor risk of GC of background tasks under load, but acceptable for fire-and-forget inserts.

Cancel/award routes don't wrap multi-step DB writes in a transaction — if the second write fails the bounty could be left in an inconsistent state. Acceptable for credit MVP, but worth noting for the Stripe Connect work where money is real.
/bounties list endpoint silently strips cancelled bounties unless explicit status=cancelled filter — documented in problem statement so working as designed.
test_credentials: admin@nova.ai/admin123 and freeuser@test.com/test123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Frontend token key is `taskforce_token` in localStorage.
seed_data_creation: Tests self-clean via _clear_bounties() at start/end of each test and final test_cleanup; freeuser topup_credits is reset to 5000 between tests via _ensure_user_has_credits.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bounty endpoints live at /api/bounties. Route ordering is critical: /bounties/my-posted and /bounties/my-submissions are declared BEFORE /bounties/{id} so FastAPI matches them as paths — verified working. Frontend uses localStorage key 'taskforce_token' for auth. The waitlist sitelock blocks /bounties when unauthenticated and renders the marketing landing page — to test the page programmatically, POST /api/auth/login then set localStorage.taskforce_token before navigation. Bounty Board page has data-testid='bounty-board-page' wrapping all content; modal has 'post-bounty-modal' + per-field testids matching the brief.
